name: Frosted Food Fight
description: 'Frosted Food Fight just brought sugary treats to the Lost Islands! Help us celebrate the release of Trap Team with him!' —Frosted Food Fight's description
biography: Frosted Food Fight is a party counterpart of Food Fight who appears exclusively in Skylanders: Lost Islands. Players could get him for free by downloading an update for Lost Islands but he was only available until the end of October 2014.
quote: 'Frosted Food Fight just brought sugary treats to the Lost Islands! Help us celebrate the release of Trap Team with him!'
personality: As a party counterpart of Food Fight, he is associated with celebrations and sugary treats, reflecting a festive and cheerful nature.

story.content: Frosted Food Fight is a party counterpart of Food Fight who appears exclusively in Skylanders: Lost Islands. Players could get him for free by downloading an update for Lost Islands but he was only available until the end of October 2014.

content: 'Frosted Food Fight just brought sugary treats to the Lost Islands! Help us celebrate the release of Trap Team with him!'

trivia: He is the third Lost Islands Alter Ego Skylander who can't be earned from the Wishing Well (the first is Admiral Thumpback and the second is Holiday Wash Buckler).
gameplay: In Skylanders: Lost Islands, Frosted Food Fight functions as an Alter Ego of Food Fight. He was released as a special promotional character to celebrate the launch of Skylanders: Trap Team and was obtainable for a limited time by downloading an update in October 2014.
